entries.raw_en:
ent-RMCPropVehicleMonoSupronBrownDestroyed = Mono-Supron
    .desc = The 'Mono-Supron', a mass-produced civilian vehicle for the colonial markets, in and outside of the United Nations. Produced by 'Mizutani' a car marque and associated operating division of the Weston-Yamada Corporation.

ent-RMCPropVehicleCargoCraneAltHitbox = cargo crane
    .desc = A crane used for loading and unloading cargo.

ent-RMCPropVehicleCargoCraneAltHitboxWest = cargo crane
    .desc = A crane used for loading and unloading cargo.

ent-RMCFiltrationDistributionDamaged = waste distribution system
    .desc = This machine separates the leftover waste from the purification processes to be discarded into space, recycled for supplies, or used for research.

ent-RMCFiltrationSedimentationAlt = sedimentation filter
    .desc = A water filter specifically designed to capture and remove sediment, such as sand, silt, dirt, and rust, from water without removing the nutritious minerals for that crisp, clean taste every time.
